programme.title: Highway to Somewhere - EP 10

She is also unsettled by what Y told her-he’s following her to protect her from Nick.

programme.title: Lucky Numbers - EP 9

Wanfa’s wife Xiuying (Sharon Au) endures fertility treatments while his infidelity ruins their marriage. After business collapse and hardship, Wanfa wins 8 million with the Zhu brothers and rebuilds his company, but old habits return as he and Jincai realise they must reunite.

programme.desc: A female general with a gentle appearance but a strong inner spirit, and a male general with a cold exterior and internal but with stronger martial prowess. They join forces to combat deceit, help the weak, and eliminate external threats.

programme.title: Lap Lip
programme.desc: When Alias's granddaughters asked why he has never put up lap-lip for Hari Raya - his response is simple their grandmother got electrocuted by lap-lip and that's why he do not want history to repeat itself. But the true history goes way back, Alias and his brother Mokhsin were the ones who brought in the electric lap-lip hype to Jalan Hari Raya after moving in from Malaysia. That became an annual competition. It's all fun and friendly till one year - things took a turn.

programme.title: Bantal Buruk Saloma - EP 3
programme.desc: BANTAL BURUK SALOMA is a social drama about foster parenting that centres around family, life, love and forming relationships that lasts a lifetime. But it comes with serious challenges, especially when Aidilfitri approaches. Aidilfitri is a happy time for most kids. But for kids in orphanage or foster care, it is not easy. Some miss their parents.

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 1
programme.desc: The mosque committee members, headed by Taufik, are eager to embark on a special Ramadan program. Rahmat misleads Taufik into thinking he will sponsor the donation distribution but expectations only lead to disappointment. Sakinah is worried about the household expenses, while Noor falls out with Siti over her online ladies wear business. Siti is determined to prove she has flair for business, too.

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: One beats the bush and another has the hare. Amongst the mosque committee members, a few have something up their sleeves. What is their intention? Syazwan is now helping Sakinah with her flourishing porridge business. However, instead of gaining sustenance, other issues start to surface. Noor is reeling with jealousy over Siti's newly launched business. Meanwhile, the GM receives an anonymous letter. What is the content of the letter and what will the GM do about it?

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Taufik organizes another admirable program for the community. Much to his disappointment, the event is unintentionally sabotaged by someone in the committee who has his own personal agenda. Siti's business is picking up and getting the attention she desires. However, her aggressive marketing strategy is at the expense of Jasmine's feelings. Meanwhile, Sakinah is having trouble managing her business with her daily house chores. She finds a shortcut to her problems.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 2
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Dapur Kencang S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: A cooking show where celebrities have to cook their favorite dishes while being asked questions about themselves.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 20
programme.desc: Seeking revenge, Farouk falsely claims Qaisara’s baby is his, damaging her reputation, while Azizi is determined to prove the child is his. Tuan Ishak finally realises that Farouk has not truly changed.

programme.title: Remuk - EP 5
programme.desc: Secrets are a double-edged sword-they can protect or wound. Samad faces an uninvited guest, while Malik and Ziana endure unwelcome remarks that threaten to fracture their relationships even further.

programme.title: Saat Hilang Cintamu
programme.desc: Razil is a devoted husband who loves his wife's Salina. However, their relationship begins to crack when Salina is influenced by her friends after she starts working. Everything changed when she met a handsome superior in the office. He seduces Salina and they start dating. What will happen?

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 23
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Travelawak Projek Bapak Bapak S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Projek Bapak Bapak S3 returns with a new twist this time they are travelling to Dubai and Korea. Will they survive a double location adventure with jet lag, language barriers and crazier challenges?

programme.title: Keikhlasan Cinta
programme.desc: Rania left her house after her father objected to her desire to become a TV presenter. She became a popular host and later paired with Hilman for a show titled Ikhlas. The two do not get along and often argue. But they try their best to face it together. Hilman manages to persuade her to meet her father.

programme.title: Anak Bulan

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Taufik gets an Ustaz to share the difference between Zakat contribution and donation. Rahmat feels it is an indirect attack on him and gets offended. Taufik starts to feel belittled by Sakinah's earning power and their marriage strains further. Noor and Jasmine get upset with Sakinah when they see her cosying up to Siti. GM receives another anonymous hate letter. He confronted the committee members and urged the perpetrator to come forward.

programme.title: Bubur Masjid Air Katira S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Sakinah and Noor got into an argument with their husbands. They panicked when Taufik and Rahmat disappeared and cannot be contacted. Rahmat and Taufik are affected emotionally when they were shamed during a committee meeting. Siti suffers an embarrassing backlash for her overzealousness. Syazwan receives good news, but is still bothered by Jasmine's emotional outbursts. Will all of them reconcile and tie lose ends before the arrival of Syawal?

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: This Ramadan, Hashim A enters a new event/catering business and seeks Hashim B's assistance, although this means leaving Jannah Association and upsetting Junipah. Meanwhile, Nadine has moved in with her in-laws and has to face her first fasting month as a new wife under the watchful eye of her mother-in-law, Mariam. Muna and Khalid's relationship blossoms but is challenged by Khalid's new responsibilities at Jannah Association and Muna's new online venture.

programme.desc: Norfasarie and Huda Ali are both mothers whose online presence is sometimes peppered with the countenance of their young children, whether to share proud mummy moments or as advertising gimmicks. In this season's opener, host Fiza O probes on how much these mummies are willing to share about their children online while sieving out the bad from the good that comes with sharenting.

programme.title: Permintaan Terakhir Abah
programme.desc: Abah's Last Request tells the story of Abah who wants to unite his children who are increasingly separated due to differences of opinion among them. Abah is determined to fix the situation by making a strange request, which is for his children to come home and gather in the village because his cancer is getting chronic and he believes that this may be his last Ramadhan and Syawal. The children who are at odds are willing to bury their egos by fulfilling Abah's last request and finally come back.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega - EP 3
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.desc: "Juara Indonesia Ramadan" is a quiz show testing knowledge and agility in answering questions quickly and accurately.

programme.title: Gak Bisa Yura, Soalnya Dia Cewek Misterius
programme.desc: Laras and Wisnu are two people who are mortal enemies and never get along. But in order to protect the land and customary forest in Laras' village, Laras and Wisnu must unite to defeat Dayat. Wisnu and Laras are upset because Dayat's company is doing arbitrary things to the villagers during land acquisition. The village land is natural land with good views and a beautiful waterfall. Wisnu is upset because his ancestor's grave was leveled by the ground.

programme.title: Janji Gak Naksir Cewek Cleansing Glowing
programme.desc: Salsa (Soraya Rasyid) fails to go on a vacation to Korea after her family suddenly goes bankrupt. To support herself financially, she works as a cleaner. At work, she meets Al (Masaji Wijayanto) and El (Jeremiah Rakesh), two brothers who often fight. Both fall for Salsa and compete to win her heart.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 8
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN - EP 19
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 5 - EP 66
programme.desc: The Pantura Bintang Stage is back looking for Bintang. Excitement, cuteness, rocking each other to become a star.

programme.title: Naura: Suara Dari Mas Kambing
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Naura, who seems to have magic. Whatever oaths that come out of her mouth, must come true. But apparently the magic of the oath suddenly disappeared when Naura fell in love with a goatman named Satria.

programme.title: Pisang Ambon Buah Kecapi, I Was Born To Make You Hepi
programme.desc: Rama was angry with Ira because as a result of the collision, Rama's banana merchandise was destroyed and fell apart on the road. Ira was also upset because he was asked to compensate Rama even though his cart was also destroyed. Ira was finally willing to compensate Rama as long as Rama's merchandise became his to sell again.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan accidentally damaged Ajeng's bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart unattended, and some children ate his bakpao without paying. Acan was upset and left Ajeng, taking his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno was already there, set to be matched with her. Is Beno the best choice for Ajeng, or is there someone else?

programme.desc: Diva (Ika Diharjo) accidentally saw Andre (Christ Laurent) being hypnotized on the street, Diva and her mother finally brought Andre to her house even though the cat is kucingan with Mr. RT. It has been going on for several hours that the hypnosis does not disappear and makes Andre realize who he really is. Diva and her mother are getting dizzy, so they agree to give Andre the pseudonym Cecep.

programme.title: MISS BETAWI & OPPA KOREA
programme.desc: Mona is known as a true Betawi woman, because of her blunt language and her Betawi lifestyle. Once, when Ida was buying vegetables on the street, she was hit by Julian's big motorcycle. Ida got angry at Julian, but the arrogant Julian just drove away. Ida was helped by a kind-hearted guy with narrow eyes, who looked like a Korean. The guy's name was Maman, but before Ida could find out his name, he had to rush off to college.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 142

programme.title: Cewek Gulali: Dia Yang Bersamaku
programme.desc: Winda, a girl selling cotton candy, is feeling troubled because she has secretly fallen in love with Aris, a man who already has a child. Winda's turmoil grows each day, especially when Aris's child asks if she wants to be their mother. What happens next?

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: Released from prison after 24 years for a crime he did not commit, David discovers that the people who framed him are now prominent citizens. Release Year: 1986 Director: Bhagyaraj

programme.title: Karan Arjun
programme.desc: Reborn in different lands, Karan and Arjun reunite through their mother's faith, rising again to take revenge on those who destroyed them in a past life. Release Year: 1995 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Best Action- Bikhu Verma, Best Editing- Sanjay Varma.

programme.title: Big Dhamaka
programme.desc: Two lookalikes from opposite worlds fall for the same woman, and a shocking link between them turns confusion into chaos, changing all their lives.

programme.title: Gopichand Jasoos
programme.desc: Detective Gopichand Jasoos tracks stolen diamonds to Goa, but rival hunters close in, forcing him into a clever race filled with danger and twists. Release Year: 1982 Director: Naresh Kumar

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a grand bungalow with their kids, but terrifying events reveal a dark presence, pushing the family to fight to survive. Release Year: 2012 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Rangrezz
programme.desc: Three friends reunite to help a lover elope, but when the couple separates, they return to teach them a lesson about loyalty and friendship. Release Year: 2013 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Chhoriyan Chhoron Se Kam Nahi Hoti
programme.desc: Determined to become an IPS officer, a young woman fights her traditional father's beliefs, battling society to prove her strength and fulfill her dream. Release Year: 2019 Director: Rajesh Amarlal Babbar

programme.title: Haseena Parkar
programme.desc: The life of Haseena Parkar, sister of India's most wanted fugitive, Dawood Ibrahim, who allegedly headed his crime syndicate in Mumbai. Release Year: 2017 Director: Apoorva Lakhia

programme.title: Koyla
programme.desc: Mute and loyal Shankar tricks Gauri into marriage for his master, but love grows unexpectedly, and she bravely stands by him against every cruel obstacle. Release Year: 1997 Director: Rakesh Roshan

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Radhe, a merciless contract killer, falls for simple Jhanvi, who challenges his dark world and forces him to choose between love, redemption, and his violent life. Release Year: 2009 Director: Prabhu Deva

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Agents Un Peu Trop Secrets
programme.desc: Because he was not promoted to director of the Cameroonian Heritage Agency, Joseph decides to set up his new boss. But nothing goes as planned and the country's land title goes missing. He must then surround himself with a special team of secret agents to avoid disaster.

programme.title: Nature Morte
programme.desc: Juliette, a policeman, joins her father Rimbaud, a farmer, in a field. One of his cows has been killed and butchered in the night. The young woman will lead the investigation.

programme.title: Une Femme A Kosyam - EP 5
programme.desc: As the legislative elections approach, an explosive article questions the legitimacy of the president's election. Very quickly, the power she had accumulated wavers, trust falters, and her political opponents rejoice. Meanwhile, Salem's partners begin to doubt his strategy.

programme.title: Une Femme A Kosyam - EP 6
programme.desc: The results of the legislative elections are announced: the new party, Patriotic Democrats, wins the largest number of seats, though without achieving an absolute majority. Revitalized by this partial victory, Suzanne now works to form strategic alliances to counter rival groups led by Francis.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 4
programme.desc: The symbolism of jewellery, new ways of wearing it and new buying behaviours.

programme.desc: March 27, 1993. The entire village of Remoulins, in the Gard region, is celebrating. While young and old enjoy the annual carnival, little Abdel, 11 years old, is missing. Hundreds of gendarmes are mobilized to find him. The investigation will lead them to a dangerous repeat offender, a particularly disturbing predator.

programme.title: Littoral - EP 20
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 13
programme.desc: Viola and Jan stop off at a rest area to try and see inside a lorry driver's cab. The episode ends in Bern near the Clock Tower at Daniel Alexander Glauser's home.

programme.title: Curieux Begin - EP 11
programme.desc: A tribute to Canadian Francophonie with guinea fowl breast, roasted cauliflower, mussels, and butter tarts. With chefs etienne Croteau and John Winter Russell, singer Damien Robitaille, and artist edith Butler.

programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Curieux Begin - EP 11
programme.desc: A tribute to Canadian Francophonie with guinea fowl breast, roasted cauliflower, mussels, and butter tarts. With chefs etienne Croteau and John Winter Russell, singer Damien Robitaille, and artist edith Butler.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 13
programme.desc: Viola and Jan stop off at a rest area to try and see inside a lorry driver's cab. The episode ends in Bern near the Clock Tower at Daniel Alexander Glauser's home.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 29
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 40
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 1
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 18
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 9
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 10
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: Le Point - EP 12
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Soir... Un Train
programme.desc: Mathias, a linguistics professor at a Flemish university, is having an affair with Anne. When he has to travel far from home to give a lecture, Anne, to his great surprise, joins him on the train. But when he wakes up, the young woman has disappeared...

programme.title: Rhin-Mississippi
programme.desc: On a social housing estate near Strasbourg, a group of children have been turfed out of their playground by a gang of young drug dealers. They decide to head off along the Rhine, in search of the Mississippi and Tom Sawyer.

programme.title: Le Code - EP 1
programme.desc: Idriss's secret is out in the open and everyone in the law firm knows that he only has a few months left to live. Assisted by Claire, Nadia defends a man accused of having killed his wife, suffering from Alzheimer's disease. An act of love or premeditated femicide?

programme.title: Le Code - EP 2
programme.desc: Idriss defends Duval, accused of killing a man trying to steal from him. Legitimate defence? It seems obvious but the facts and the judge's investigations challenge his client's version. Nadia comes to the assistance of her partner Alice, a teacher accused of having hit a pupil in her class.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 10
programme.desc: Pierre Chastenay, Yanick Villedieu and Christian Messier are three scientists who share the same springtime passion: producing artisanal maple syrup.

programme.title: Meurtres A Amiens
programme.desc: On a canal amidst the ''hortillonnages'', the floating market gardens of Amiens, a lifeless body is found in a Nautilus-shaped fun-fair gondola. Inspector Monet and his assistant Barnier head the investigation. The victim, a seemingly ordinary woman, was apparently threatened ambitious plans for a Jules Verne theme park.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand - EP 20
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 24
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: Gerald Watelet shines the spotlight on the people putting Belgium on the map. Expect reports on the best culture and heritage ambassadors, behind-the-scenes glimpses of elite events and profiles of those making headlines.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 30
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 41
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 2
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 19
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 11
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 12
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Des Racines & Des Ailes - EP 3
programme.desc: In 2025, Rome will host the Vatican Jubilee, an important event for Catholics worldwide that takes place every twenty-five years. More than 32 million visitors are expected in the Italian capital, which takes the opportunity to restore and highlight its architectural and cultural treasures.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Pilotes De Brousse - EP 1
programme.desc: The pilots of Air Tunilik begin the season with ski-equipped planes. Simon Constant and his team deploy to Lake Pau to open a hydrobase essential for snowmobile expeditions. Between northern lights and critical missions, the daily life of these enthusiasts blends resilience and challenges.

programme.title: Movie - Ellame En Thangachi
programme.desc: A family entertainer about a brother and sister.

programme.title: Movie - Adhisaya Manithan
programme.desc: A group of friends decides to stay in an old bungalow for a vacation. However, a resident evil spirit of a man starts killing them one by one, and one woman struggles to come out of the place alive.

programme.title: Movie - Sound Party
programme.desc: A landlord helps a girl become a doctor after she is forced to discontinue her studies due to monetary constraints. Soon, he falls in love with her. But around the same time, the village chief hatches a plan to get his son married to her.

programme.title: Movie - Melmaruvathur Arpudhangal
programme.desc: A god-fearing woman gets married to a man who is equally religious. However, her life turns upside down when her husband accuses her of being unfaithful.

programme.title: Movie - Vetri Vizha
programme.desc: After a fatal accident, a man suffers from amnesia. However, when flashes from his past help him discover his combat skills, he sets out on a mission to find his true identity.

programme.title: Movie - Good Luck
programme.desc: Surya, a carefree young man, lives in Malaysia with his brother and sister-in-law. He falls in love with Priya, a dancer, but problems ensue in their love life when she learns that he has a daughter.

programme.title: Movie - Koattai Mariamman
programme.desc: Eashwar, an atheist, seeks fortunes by stealing and selling off the golden eyes from the idols of a Hindu deity. However, his wife, who is an ardent devotee of a goddess, tries to save him.

programme.title: Movie - Ellaisamy
programme.desc: Ellaichami is a righteous village chieftain who protects his people. Out of the blue, Kaveri enters Ellaichami's village and turns his life upside down before she reveals her true identity.

programme.title: Movie - Enn Iniya Pon Nilave
programme.desc: Shiva and Rosie are in love and decide to elope. However, they face financial crises and have ego clashes when they start living in an old building amidst fraudsters and prostitutes.

programme.title: Movie - Nyayam
programme.desc: Nyayam is a movie directed by R Krishnamurthy featuring Prabhu, Nalini, Thengai Srinivasan, M.N.Nambiar and M.R.R.Raghu, with music by Ilaiyaraaja.

programme.title: Movie - Neethiyin Marupakkam

programme.title: Movie - Unakkagave Vazhukkiren

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'The Entertainers', Kevin Keegan's Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW31 Bournemouth v Manchester United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 15
programme.desc: Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 31
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City's Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 19
programme.desc: Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle's agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan's side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 32
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Manon Fiorot vs. Mellony Guegjes
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the TF2 women's flyweight finale between Manon Fiorot and Mellony Guegjes. Bonus coverage includes Adrian Sanchez vs. Serge Kasanda.

programme.title: WCCB Otto Wallin vs. Gianluca Mandras
programme.desc: Italian champ Gianluca Mandras (12-4, 5 KOs) battles 26-year-old Swedish southpaw Otto Wallin (17-0, 11 KOs) for the WBA Continental Heavyweight Championship in Wallin's hometown of Sundsvall in the city's premiere professional boxing event. Wallin expects to seize the title, while Mandras plans to spoil Wallin's homecoming celebration at the Sporthallen arena.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Deandre Latimore vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: This episode features Carlos Quintana's penultimate bout, as he fights Deandre Latimore, in a light middleweight title contest, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (II)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the second encounter between middleweights Paul Williams and Sergio Martinez. This time around, championship gold is on the line in a bout that will not go the distance. Also on the card, Marcos Maidana tries to jump up a weight class.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Endo, Okinoumi, Takarafuji and Shimanoumi from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship as well as Boys Forms, Synchronized Team Weapons and a World Record Break.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features Michael Bisping as he talks about his fame, Dominick Cruz in the announcer's booth and Tito Ortiz shows off his house.

programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the TF2 women's flyweight finale between Manon Fiorot and Mellony Guegjes. Bonus coverage includes Adrian Sanchez vs. Serge Kasanda.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Manon Fiorot vs. Mellony Guegjes
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the TF2 women's flyweight finale between Manon Fiorot and Mellony Guegjes. Bonus coverage includes Adrian Sanchez vs. Serge Kasanda.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 6: Bandung, Indonesia - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Pencak Silat and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet, Throws and Weapons featuring Masters Rita Suwanda and Dadang Gunawan.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Aoiyama, Takagenji and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.desc: Mayor Oki and Geoffrey get competitive. Whose fizzy water will come out on top?

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 25

programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 43
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Guinea Fowl didn't have dots. She was an adventurous bird and loved to discover things. One day Tortoise challenges her to find out why the top of Mount Tinga Tinga shines. Guinea Fowl can't resist and races off, over the desert, past the ocean, up to the very top of Mount Tinga Tinga where she does indeed discover why the top of Mount Tinga Tinga shines.... SNOW! Guinea Fowl is the first ever animal to see snow! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 44
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Buffalo didn't have horns. He had very long shaggy hair and he lived near the Swamp. But then one day the Swamp moves and Buffalo has to find a new home! The Swamp grows and grows and soon all the horned animals who live on the Plains risk losing their home too. So Buffalo decides to save the day and push back the muddy swamp. Tales from Africa.

With Boss Baby’s cover at stake, it’s up to the Templeton Family to get Benji out of their hair as he sniffs around for a case that could garner the attention from federal law enforcement.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 72

With Crispin having booked her for a seemingly endless stay, Tina is trapped in a paradise nightmare, and in a tunnel of madness starts to think that she may even be Crispin.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 73

But Boss and Tina struggle to stay on the same page after Tina admits that she might, kinda, sorta be thinking about retiring as a regular baby.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 37

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: It's parents' weekend at Lake Summer Camp, and Krupp's eager to make amends with Harold and George ... or so he says.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 39

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 45

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of great wars fought with groundbreaking weaponry, but what about everything else in between? Like missiles manned by pigeons to a helmet outfitted with firearms.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: From pedal cars to Power Wheels, we're rolling our way through the history of the hottest toys on wheels and the surprising stories behind their creations.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: From Furbys to Pogs, the 1990s were full of unforgettable fad toys! It was a decade where old-school toys like Beanie Babies went head-to-head with high-tech wonders like Tamagotchi.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 36
programme.desc: A cereal executive's bold idea to finance the "Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory" movie will kick-off a sweets revolution that produces some of the most iconic, imaginative confections in history.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 34
programme.desc: There have been many sacred relics believed to be imbued with mystical powers. Is it possible that these ordinary items, like a tooth, or a soldier's spear, can have the ability to perform miracles?

programme.title: The Pickers (S18) - EP 328
programme.desc: Mike visits the Virginia birthplace of a high-speed camera that changed the world. Meanwhile in Nashville, a music guru has some sobering news about Danielle's rock'n'roll gamble.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Explore the forgotten kingdom of the White Rajahs of Sarawak, and uncover the disappearing headhunting tribe known as the Ibans.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world's most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies... Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 7
programme.desc: A powerful hurricane forces Jeff's team into a secluded cove, where they investigate The Lombrac, a legendary 18th-century ghost ship. The divers recover intriguing clues from the murky depths.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 16
programme.desc: In 2016, an illness strikes dozens of government officials in Cuba. Over the next few years, hundreds more are afflicted. But investigations raise more questions than answers about this bizarre epidemic.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4) - EP 11
programme.desc: When the team performs a hi-tech experiment at the Triangle, it leads to a stunning revelation that may explain the strange phenomena on Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16) - EP 250
programme.desc: Dr. Jacques Vallee holds multiple scientific degrees and is one of the fathers of the internet. Will Dr. Vallee's work lead to answers about what has been happening in our skies for thousands of years?

programme.desc: Troy and Pickle battle a hyper aggressive breed of python. Bill and Tes try to stay one step ahead of the Army Corp of Engineers. Dusty works on a plan to get the snakes to come to him.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4) - EP 12
programme.desc: A daring rocket and helicopter experiment results in the team witnessing a phenomenon that might prove an ancient legend about Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 4

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 5
programme.desc: Marty battles the brutal Alaskan winter while running his wildfire-ravaged trapline in the Far North; Mike reclaims an abandoned set of solar panels to power his Kodiak Island homestead.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 5
programme.desc: Optimism abounds when the Fellowship returns to Smith's Cove and finds evidence of work that could finally uncover the legendary flood tunnels and lead them directly to the Money Pit.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Are modern-day pirates prowling the Bermuda Triangle in search of victims? The team takes on the twisted case of a missing boat called the Saba Bank lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S12) - EP 5
programme.desc: Jake's snowmobile breaks down in the heart of Lion Alley. Paul takes on a neighbour's beaver and muskrat problem. Kidd and Harry plow a backcountry airstrip so planes can land safely.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case murder of a young Marine who was killed in a hotel room and charge the woman who was with him at the time. Is she the mastermind behind his death or an innocent victim?

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence - EP 7
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 1
programme.desc: A man is killed instantly after a head-on collision with a young mother driving home from a late-night shift at a Florida hotel. The Prosecution allege she was under the influence and caused the crash.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 6

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 8

programme.title: The Pacific (2026) - EP 1
programme.desc: The Pacific is back for 2026. This week: Tongan women speak up about harassment in kava clubs, families in Port Moresby face eviction, plus how Melbourne's Storm Waka program is changing young Pasifika lives. (Return)

programme.title: Movin' To The Country S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: On SA's Limestone Coast, Craig heads to a non-conformist winery, Kristy meets a couple who traded in a life of luxury yachts to hang out with camels and Halina explores a clever approach to tackling plastic waste.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 45
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Catherine Murphy present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, sport, politics plus Nate Byrne with the weather.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1

programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Global Business

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The Heat

programme.desc: Yoon Hak tells Yeo Hwa of his suspicion on Ji Sung's vicious crimes. Ji Sung wants Yeo Hwa to go for a 3-year mourning beside her husband's grave.

programme.title: Curtain Call - EP 2
programme.desc: Jae Heon accepts Sang Cheol's offer to pose as Geum Soon's grandson. Geum Soon's entire family wait for the arrival of 'Moon Seong' and his wife.

programme.title: Motel California - EP 12
programme.desc: Gang Hee decides to transform Motel California into a nursing home for Chun Pil. Otel Hana finally opens.

programme.title: My Kid's Private Life Season 1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Hwang Shin Young's lovely children, the Hug Triplets, go on a long journey to run their first errand of their lives.

programme.title: South Wind Knows - EP 26
programme.desc: Adapted from a novel, the story tells the story of how Yun Shen (Cheng Yi), a researcher at a pharmaceutical company and Zhu Jiu (Zhang Yu Xi), a surgeon embarking on a humanitarian medical rescue, got off the wrong foot, but eventually found love.

programme.title: Hello, Saturday - EP 94

programme.desc: Mai Cheng Huan, a post-95 girl from an ordinary Shanghainese family proposes to her boyfriend, Xin Jia Liang, due to her mother's urging. The well-to-do Xin family topples the balance of this relationship. Watch how Cheng Huan embarks on her own growth path.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.desc: This epic Australian road trip taks you on a drive through stunning landscapes, tackling navigation challenges and camping antics along the way, with our celebrity hosts sharing career memories and brotherhood for hilarious and nostalgic fun.

programme.title: Dolce Vita 2021
programme.desc: Life in Hong Kong is vibrant and diverse, and this show presents both sophisticated lifestyles and down-to-earth, high-quality experiences. Each episode invites elites from various industries to share their secrets to success.

programme.title: LOKYI IN THE WILD
programme.desc: TVB Jade brings you endless entertainment with concurrent dramas and sitcoms, as well as the latest news, variety and infotainment programmes from TVB.

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 2
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: News At 18:30
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every evening at 6:30pm.

programme.title: Global Citizens & What's On Today
programme.desc: In this age of globalisation, everyone's lives are interconnected. This eight-episode programme invites eight foreign residents of Hong Kong to share the cultural characteristics of their countries, such as Chile, Ukraine, Japan, Pakistan, the United States and more.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2771
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous - EP 23
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: The Imperial Coroner (II) - EP 15

programme.title: Road Trip Down Under

programme.title: EXTRA
programme.desc: Keep up with the news on the entertainment circle in Hong Kong and all over the world, with reports on the latest drama series, movies, concert highlights, award ceremonies and more.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: A round-up of the news before the day ends.

programme.title: Global View
programme.desc: Bringing you the news from Hong Kong, the mainland and around the world every day.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 3
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 17
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2173
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 33
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 11
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 1
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 6
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 17
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 24
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 25
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 11
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.
